# Operator Work Module

Module ID: operator-work
Status: draft
Purpose: agent-readable tasks, focus blocks, daily reviews, and auditable edits.
Entrypoint: src/index.ts
Check: pnpm check:spec
Build: pnpm build

Use this module through its use cases and `OperatorWorkStore` port. Do not let agents write tables directly. Every mutation should include `actorId` and `source`.
